notes: Light Magna (M3) grid. True Purity Sunblade MH (Xeno ULB), Luminiera Bolt Credo x3 (M3 FLB), Pillar of Flame x3 (M2 FLB), Rhongomyniad ULB, Ultima Sword ULB (gauph: Strife + alpha + Tria, user-confirmed), Sword of Renunciation. Summons: main Luminiera Omega 250, friend Lucifer 250, subs Metatron/Halluel and Malluel/Lu Woh 4*/Belial/The Star/Mars (Summer). Optimus enhancement 40 = Lu Woh's SUB aura (Six-Dragon sub auras apply from regular sub slots). Panel: DMG Cap 20 orange (capped; Vivification 1% x 7 omega-skill weapons x 3 counts the opus's omega s1). GRID CORRECTIONS (panel-derived, pending user confirmation): sword transcendence 5 -> 4 (Apotheosis reads SL20: omega Might 76x3.3=250.8, omega DMG Amp 1.75x3.3=5.775); sword pendulum set to Extremity as a placeholder - the panel shows no pendulum line at enhancement 230, so it is NOT beta (Skill DMG Cap 50 = Astral Pierce II alone); actual pendulum needs user confirmation (gamma/delta/Extremity/Sagacity/Supremacy all invisible here). Sunveil's Radiance (Xeno MH Normal-stamina, Eden curve 15 at 100% HP, not summon-boosted) does NOT appear on the panel's stamina lines.

unmodeled.label: Stamina (purple)
unmodeled.why: unknown source — purple badge pair with HP 8; no grid skill produces 5/8 (Sunveil is 15 at full HP). Ask: in-game tooltip?
